label: Source HubDB table
name: journalist_table
help_text: Use a journalist table with a media outlet relation, or use the media outlet table directly for outlet-only sliders.

label: HubDB query
name: hubdb_query
help_text: Optional HubDB query string, for example orderBy=sort_order&limit=12. Leave blank to use all table rows.

label: Item limit
name: max_journalists
help_text: Only used when Items to show is set to Limit items.

children.label: Journalist title column
children.name: journalist_title
children.help_text: Optional title/role column on each journalist row.

children.label: Journalist URL column
children.name: journalist_url
children.help_text: Optional URL column on each journalist row. Default maps to the TWIC Author URL column.

children.label: Media outlet relation column
children.name: media_outlet
children.help_text: Relation column on the journalist table.

children.label: Media outlet name column
children.name: media_outlet_name
children.help_text: Name column on the related media outlet HubDB row.

children.label: Media outlet logo column
children.name: media_outlet_logo
children.help_text: Image column on the related media outlet HubDB row.

children.label: Media outlet tag URL column
children.name: media_outlet_tag_url
children.help_text: TWIC tag URL column on the related media outlet HubDB row.
